reminder.title: Title
reminder.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
reminder.seriesScopePrompt: Update just this occurrence, or the entire series?
reminder.repeatsEveryNDays: Repeats every {count} day | Repeats every {count} days
reminder.repeatsEveryNHours: Repeats every {count} hour | Repeats every {count} hours
reminder.repeatsEveryNWeeks: Repeats every {count} week | Repeats every {count} weeks
reminder.repeatsEveryNMonths: Repeats every {count} month | Repeats every {count} months
reminder.repeatsEveryNYears: Repeats every {count} year | Repeats every {count} years

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiParsingDescription: AI parsing provides better natural language understanding
settings.fastSaveDescription: Skip confirmation for clear, high-confidence parses.
settings.apiKeyMissing: Provide an API key to enable AI parsing
settings.clearOldConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete old reminders? This cannot be undone.
settings.hotkeyDescription: Global shortcut to open the Quick Add overlay
settings.hourlyWindowDescription: Every N hours reminders run only inside this daily time range.
settings.exactAlarmPromptMessage: Open Android settings and enable "Alarms & reminders" for this app to get on-time notifications.
settings.cloudSyncSetupMessage: Do you want to create a new sync account or pair this device with an existing one?
settings.pinInstructions: Enter the 6-digit PIN shown on your already-synced device.
settings.pinGenerated: Your Pairing PIN is valid for 5 minutes.
settings.invalidPinDialogMessage: The PIN you entered is incorrect or has expired. Please try generating a new one on your other device.
settings.pairingSuccessMessage: Your device is now securely paired! Syncing will begin automatically.
settings.silenceTimeoutDescription: Milliseconds of silence before voice recognition finalises the utterance. Default: 2000.
settings.openAtLoginDescription: Automatically launch MAI Reminder when you log in to your computer.
settings.notificationDisplayTimeDescription: Seconds the notification remains visible. Default: 60.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their defaults? This will also unpair this device from Cloud Sync.

errors.rateLimit: AI parsing temporarily unavailable. Using local parser.
errors.parseFailure: Couldn't understand that. Try rephrasing with a specific time.
errors.apiKeyRequired: AI parsing requires a Cerebras API key. Please provide it in settings.
errors.exactAlarmDisabled: Exact alarms are disabled for this app on Android. Reminders may arrive late. Enable 'Alarms & reminders' in app settings.
errors.timeMustBeInFuture: Reminder time should be in the future
errors.general: Something went wrong. Retry or contact support.
